title: Fluffy Slovakian Rice Biryani
description: A dairyfree, umamirich postworkout dish that blends sushi rice with Slovakian paprika and a quick tadka for a fluffy, flavorful performance boost.

ingredients.name: onion, garlic, ginger mix
ingredients.amount: 1 medium onion, 3 cloves garlic, 1 inch ginger, 2 tbsp oil

ingredients.name: tadka spice mix
ingredients.amount: 1 tsp (cumin, mustard, dried red chili flakes)

instructions: Rinse the sushi rice until the water runs clear and soak for 10 minutes.
In a saucepan, combine the vegetable broth, coconut milk, and a pinch of salt; bring to a gentle simmer.
Add the rinsed rice to the simmering liquid, cover, reduce the heat to low, and cook for 15‑18 minutes until the rice is fluffy and the liquid is absorbed. Remove from heat and keep covered.
While the rice cooks, heat 2 tbsp oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add the onion, garlic, and ginger; sauté until translucent, about 3‑4 minutes.
Add the diced carrots to the skillet and cook for an additional 3‑4 minutes until they are slightly tender.
Stir in the smoked paprika, caraway seeds, and tadka spice mix; toast the spices for 30 seconds to release their aromas.
Add the nutritional yeast and cook for 1 minute, allowing it to coat the vegetables.
Gently fold the cooked rice into the skillet, mixing carefully to preserve the fluffy texture.
Season with lemon zest, salt, and pepper, tossing to combine everything evenly.
Serve the biryani hot, optionally garnished with fresh herbs such as cilantro or parsley.
